task.title: Task
task.description: A task card floating on the interactive physics drawing board.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this task

color.description: Visual theme preset or color code of the task card

posX.description: Current X coordinate on the physical board simulation

posY.description: Current Y coordinate on the physical board simulation

pinned.description: If true, the card is stationary and ignores physics forces

reminderTime.description: ISO timestamp for task reminder notification

boardDrawing.title: BoardDrawing
boardDrawing.description: Serialized free-form vector drawings layered on the workspace board.

id.description: Unique identifier of the drawing layer (often matches userId or boardId)

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this drawing layer

strokesData.description: Compressed or serialized JSON string representing draw strokes

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when drawing was last changed

boardSettings.title: BoardSettings
boardSettings.description: User preferences for the overall board workspace.

showGrid.description: Whether to overlay a subtle grid alignment system

users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Subcollection of floating tasks created by a specific user.

users/{userId}/drawings/{drawingId}.description: Subcollection for drawing canvas layers owned by the user.

users/{userId}/settings/{settingsId}.description: Subcollection for storing user's board layout preferences.
